query: SELECT c.accountId, a.name AS accountName, COUNT(*) AS contactCount FROM contacts c JOIN accounts a ON c.accountId = a.id WHERE c.accountId IN (390023, 390024, 390025) GROUP BY c.accountId, a.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nUtjHxifDnrEvTS.bc571705cde8 --database KNXKWFANWEUxWWEfuwT2Hr --execute SELECT c.accountId, a.name AS accountName, COUNT(*) AS contactCount FROM contacts c JOIN accounts a ON c.accountId = a.id WHERE c.accountId IN (390023, 390024, 390025) GROUP BY c.accountId, a.name;
